raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "expressing a personal or collective commitment to surrender self-direction to a personally conceived higher power, framed as a transformative decision",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a higher power exists that can provide care",
    "surrendering personal will and life produces positive outcomes",
    "individuals possess agency to make such a surrender",
    "understanding of the higher power can be subjective yet still effective"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as metaphorical language of release and trust, with the qualifier 'as we understood Him' preserving flexibility across differing beliefs",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the expression must resonate subjectively with the audience, support emotional relief or behavioral change in contexts like recovery, and align with the user's willingness to adopt a non-literal spiritual framing",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the audience interprets it as a literal command requiring abdication of all personal responsibility, or applies it in a way that discourages critical thinking or practical action"
}
